goal: Add a side-effect-free audit receipt record authority builder for runtime patch consume execution receipt record audit receipt record preflights without runtime execution, patch application, route/server mutation, record writes, audit persistence, or permit consumption.
scope_out: Do not execute runtime, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, write records, receipts, or audits, perform durable writes, consume permits, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Runtime patch audit receipt record preflight artifacts can be authorized without recording them.
Audit receipt record authority id, authorized-by ref, and expiry ref are required.
Runtime execution, execution allowance, audit writes, durable persistence, patch application, route mutation, server mutation, and permit consumption remain false.
assumptions: Audit receipt record materialization and durable persistence require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing expiry ref, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Runtime execution, patch application, route mutation, server mutation, record write, receipt write, audit persistence, durable write, permit consumption, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-185 preflighted runtime audit receipt records without recording them.
